name: Mereo BioPharma Group plc
business: Mereo BioPharma Group plc is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the development of innovative therapeutics for rare diseases. Its late-stage rare disease product candidates include setrusumab for osteogenesis imperfecta (OI) and alvelestat for severe alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency-associated lung disease (AATD-LD). The company also has an early-stage rare disease program, vantictumab, for autosomal dominant osteopetrosis Type 2 (ADO2).

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company focused on the development of innovative therapeutics for rare diseases.

catalysts.event: Announcement of Phase 3 Orbit and Cosmic study results for setrusumab
catalysts.sentence: On December 29, 2025, we announced the results from the Phase 3 Orbit and Cosmic studies evaluating setrusumab in pediatric and young adult patients with OI.

tamClaims.claim: Estimated 50,000 persons in North America and 60,000 in Europe with genotypes for AATD-LD
tamClaims.sentence: There are an estimated 50,000 and 60,000 persons in North America and Europe, respectively, with the genotypes that we could enroll in our clinical trials for AATD-LD, the target indication for alvelestat.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 10,000 patients diagnosed in North America for AATD-LD
tamClaims.sentence: However, due to underdiagnosis, there are estimated to be approximately 10,000 patients diagnosed in North America.
